## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## User impact

Explain the visible behavior, documentation, or workflow impact.

## Evidence and boundaries

List official sources, corpus evidence, or synthetic fixtures used. Confirm that no private manuscript, reviewer correspondence, credential, raw corpus file, or personal path is included.

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py"`
- [ ] Evidence validation, when relevant
- [ ] Public figure evaluations, when relevant
- [ ] Installer smoke test, when relevant
- [ ] `git diff --check`
